decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28 for the carbyne tier; the house code and the mergeability rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: Median returns the correct median of the SORTED values: for an odd count the middle value, and for an EVEN count the average of the two middle values; 0 for an empty slice.
The change modifies only stats/stats.go and adds no new dependency.

weighted.criterion: It does NOT mutate the input slice xs — it sorts a copy (e.g. via the existing sortedCopy helper), consistent with Mean leaving xs untouched.
